changelog:
* **feat: add background update checker** (8e8494c)
  - Add WorkManager CoroutineWorker for periodic 15-minute background OTA checks
  - Schedule OtaCheckWorker automatically on connected networks in MainActivity
  - Add androidx.work runtime dependency to Gradle configuration
  - Cache last notified version in SharedPreferences to prevent duplicate alerts
  - Launch app directly into Material update dialog when clicking notifications
  - Upgrade notification channel priority to high with custom OTA title text
  - Add curl push step to GitHub Actions workflow for instant ntfy notifications
  - Handle extra update intent flag when app opens from notification tap
* **style: reorder launcher shortcuts** (434b4ff)
  - Move GitHub shortcut to first position and Telegram to second position
